title: Actor
description: Formal schema for an actor per D9 (actor kind) + D22 (substrate-binding resolution refinement). An actor is an attribution-bearing participant in a workspace. Notation: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 per D28. Layer-3 formal schema per D11. Cross-kind referential integrity (e.g., agent-actor.substrate-binding refs an existing binding-id within workspace.composition.substrate-bindings[]) is out of scope per D28.

id.description: Workspace-scoped stable identifier (D9). Instance-identifier per D34. Persists across substrate restarts, runtime episodes, and the workspace's full lifecycle.

subtype.description: Either a core actor-subtype (human-actor, agent-actor per D9) or a fully-qualified extension-registered subtype per D29.

substrate-binding.description: References a binding-id within workspace.composition.substrate-bindings[] (D9 + D22). Instance-identifier per D34.
